response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly accomplished Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience spanning full-stack web, mobile, embedded systems, and AI-agent infrastructure — technically capable of fulfilling every requirement in the posting and several nice-to-haves (LLM integration, Kubernetes, AWS). However, the role is explicitly scoped as junior-to-mid entry-level, and the candidate's seniority level creates irreconcilable mismatches: compensation expectations will almost certainly exceed budget, and the lack of growth headroom makes retention risk extremely high. The technical skills are genuinely strong, but the seniority gap makes this a poor fit for the position as described.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js proficiency demonstrated across multiple production roles at Tencent and Naver, directly matching the primary required skill
Full-stack background covering React, REST APIs, and web architecture, with added nice-to-have experience in LLM/AI-agent tooling and Kubernetes
Strong engineering culture alignment — TDD, clean architecture, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practiced and taught across multiple roles
concerns: Dramatically overqualified at Staff/Senior level with 15+ years of experience; the role targets candidates early in their careers, creating a likely budget and expectation mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience visible in the resume — stack familiarity leans toward MongoDB, CDK, and custom frameworks rather than the preferred tooling
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with the candidate's profile; no indication of availability or interest in a junior-scoped, heavily in-person position
